items.summary: Update the payment confirmation flow in PaymentSection.tsx and the corresponding helper in frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts so that when the customer clicks 'Payment Done', a unique UTE reference number (e.g., 'UTE-' followed by a timestamp-based or random alphanumeric string) is auto-generated and automatically included in the pre-filled WhatsApp message. No manual input from the customer is required — the entire redirect must be fully automatic with the reference number embedded in the message body.
